restaurants.name: Savanna & Co.
restaurants.description: Our flagship restaurant celebrates the rich culinary heritage of East Africa through a modern lens. Chef-driven tasting menus pair local produce with globally inspired technique, served in an atmosphere of relaxed opulence.

restaurants.name: The Gold Bar
restaurants.description: An intimate lounge of burnished gold, dark timber, and velvet seating. Our mixologists craft signature cocktails inspired by the flavours of Kenya — from tamarind sours to baobab-infused spirits.

restaurants.name: Poolside Terrace
restaurants.description: Dine under open skies beside our infinity pool. Light fare, fresh juices, and grilled specialties served from morning until sunset. The perfect companion to a languid afternoon by the water.

featuredDishes.name: Pan-Seared Tilapia
featuredDishes.description: Lake Victoria tilapia, lemon butter sauce, sautéed greens

featuredDishes.name: Nyama Choma Platter
featuredDishes.description: Slow-roasted lamb, house-made kachumbari, ugali cakes

featuredDishes.name: Swahili Prawn Curry
featuredDishes.description: Coastal coconut curry, saffron rice, pickled mango

featuredDishes.name: Avocado & Crab Stack
featuredDishes.description: Kenyan avocado, blue crab, citrus vinaigrette

featuredDishes.name: Chocolate Safari Tart
featuredDishes.description: Dark chocolate ganache, passion fruit curd, gold leaf

featuredDishes.name: Breakfast Platter
featuredDishes.description: Farm eggs, grilled tomato, avocado, artisan breads
